level_scope.5pt: Core 5pt calculus; all differentiation rules tested in Bagrut

concepts.subject: math

concepts.subject: math

Derived units: newton, joule, watt, pascal, coulomb

concepts.name: Vectors — Basics
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Vector addition: triangle method and parallelogram method
Resolving vectors into components (x and y)

concepts.name: Kinematics in 1D
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: x-t, v-t, a-t graphs — reading and interpretation

concepts.name: Projectile Motion
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Decomposing initial velocity into x and y components
Velocity at any time (components and magnitude)

concepts.name: Friction
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Problems combining friction and Newton's laws

concepts.name: Circular Motion
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Circular motion on flat road (friction provides centripetal force)

concepts.name: Gravitation
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Newton's law of gravitation: F = Gm₁m₂/r²

concepts.name: Momentum & Impulse
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Newton's 2nd law in terms of momentum
Elastic collisions: both KE and p conserved

concepts.name: Simple Harmonic Motion (SHM)
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Position, velocity, acceleration as functions of time
Energy in SHM: KE + PE = constant

concepts.name: Torque & Static Equilibrium
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Conditions for static equilibrium: ΣF=0 and Στ=0
Balancing a beam on a pivot
Uniform beam supported at two points

concepts.name: Extended Static Equilibrium
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Stability and center of mass position

concepts.name: Rotational Kinematics
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Relationship between linear and angular: v=rω, a=rα

concepts.name: Sound Waves
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Nature of sound: longitudinal pressure wave
Speed of sound in different media

concepts.name: Geometric Optics
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Plane mirror: image location and properties
Concave and convex mirrors: focal length

concepts.name: Electrostatics
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Electric field of a point charge: E = kq/r²

concepts.name: Electric Field & Potential
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Work by electric field: W = qΔV
Motion of charged particle in electric field
Uniform electric field between plates: E = V/d

concepts.name: Kirchhoff's Laws
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: KCL: sum of currents at node = 0
KVL: sum of voltages in loop = 0

concepts.name: Magnetism & Magnetic Forces
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Magnetic field of a long wire: B = μ₀I/(2πr)
Force on a current-carrying wire: F = BIL·sinθ
Force on moving charge: F = qv×B (Lorentz force)
Magnetic field inside solenoid: B = μ₀nI
Circular motion of charge in magnetic field

concepts.name: Electromagnetic Induction
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: EMF of a moving conductor in magnetic field: EMF = BLv
Energy stored in inductor: U = ½LI²

concepts.name: AC Circuits
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: AC voltage and current: V = V₀·sin(ωt)

concepts.name: Quantum Physics Basics (Photoelectric Effect)
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Photoelectric effect: light ejects electrons from metal
Work function: minimum energy to eject electron
Einstein's photoelectric equation: KE_max = hf - φ

concepts.name: Atomic Models & Hydrogen Spectrum
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Photon emission and absorption: ΔE = hf

concepts.name: Nuclear Physics & Radioactivity
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Nucleus: protons, neutrons; atomic number Z, mass number A

concepts.name: Special Relativity (Basic)
concepts.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Speed of light as universal speed limit
Mass-energy: E = mc² (primarily for nuclear problems)

concepts.name: Cell Structure & Organelles
concepts.subject: biology
skill_atoms: Plant cell: cell wall and chloroplasts

electrostatics.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Electric field of a point charge: E = kq/r²

electric_field.name: Electric Field & Potential
electric_field.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Work by electric field: W = qΔV
Motion of charged particle in electric field
Uniform electric field between plates: E = V/d

kirchhoff_laws.name: Kirchhoff's Laws
kirchhoff_laws.subject: physics
skill_atoms: KCL: sum of currents at node = 0
KVL: sum of voltages in loop = 0

magnetism.name: Magnetism & Magnetic Forces
magnetism.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Magnetic field of a long wire: B = μ₀I/(2πr)
Force on a current-carrying wire: F = BIL·sinθ
Force on moving charge: F = qv×B (Lorentz force)
Magnetic field inside solenoid: B = μ₀nI
Circular motion of charge in magnetic field

electromagnetic_induction.name: Electromagnetic Induction
electromagnetic_induction.subject: physics
skill_atoms: EMF of a moving conductor in magnetic field: EMF = BLv
Energy stored in inductor: U = ½LI²

ac_circuits.name: AC Circuits
ac_circuits.subject: physics
skill_atoms: AC voltage and current: V = V₀·sin(ωt)

modern_physics_intro.name: Quantum Physics Basics (Photoelectric Effect)
modern_physics_intro.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Photoelectric effect: light ejects electrons from metal
Work function: minimum energy to eject electron
Einstein's photoelectric equation: KE_max = hf - φ

atomic_models.name: Atomic Models & Hydrogen Spectrum
atomic_models.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Photon emission and absorption: ΔE = hf

nuclear_physics.name: Nuclear Physics & Radioactivity
nuclear_physics.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Nucleus: protons, neutrons; atomic number Z, mass number A

special_relativity.name: Special Relativity (Basic)
special_relativity.subject: physics
skill_atoms: Speed of light as universal speed limit
Mass-energy: E = mc² (primarily for nuclear problems)
